call.roomFull: 🚫 Ụlọ ahụ juputara - mmadụ abụọ so na ya

coach.title: Onye Inyeaka AI: Otu esi aza
coach.promptPlaceholder: Jụọ ihe ọ bụla - gbasara mkparịta ụka ahụ ma ọ bụ ajụjụ ọ bụla nke gị

tonePrompts.joke: Zaa ya n'ụzọ dị mfe ma dịkwa mma, jiri ihe ọchị.
tonePrompts.formal: Zaa ya n'ụzọ iwu kwadoro na nkwanye ùgwù.
tonePrompts.deep: Nye azịza nyocha miri emi yana ihe akaebe.
tonePrompts.scientific: Zaa dị ka onye ọkà mmụta sayensị, yana njikọ na nyocha ma ọ bụ data.
tonePrompts.empathic: Zaghachi n'ụzọ ọmịiko, na-aghọta mmetụta nke onye nke ọzọ.

roomActions.deleteSub: Mechie nzukọ ahụ ma hichapụ data niile

billing.lowBalanceSub: Zụta nkeji ọzọ iji mee ka mkparịta ụka gị na-aga n'ihu.
billing.paywallNoSub: Iji mepụta ọnụ ụlọ, biko denye aha maka atụmatụ

changePwd.title: Gbanwee okwuntughe
changePwd.errSameAsOld: Paswọọdụ ọhụrụ dabara na nke ochie ahụ
changePwd.errWrongCurrent: Paswọọdụ dị ugbu a ezighi ezi
changePwd.errNoPassword: Mgbanwe okwuntughe adịghị maka akaụntụ a (nbanye Google).
changePwd.errSuperAdmin: E debere paswọọdụ super-admin na nhazi sava ahụ.

sip.title: SIP ekwentị
sip.subtitle: Ịtọlite SIP trunks maka oku na-abata na oku na-apụ apụ
sip.passwordChangeLabel: Paswọọdụ ọhụrụ (hapụ oghere ka ọ ghara ịgbanwe)

incoming.heading: Oku SIP na-abata
incoming.lead: Adreesị SIP pụrụ iche maka izipu oku mpụga site n'aka onye na-enye gị ọrụ na sistemụ VibeVox.
incoming.emptyHint: Mepụta SIP URI + nbanye/paswọọdụ pụrụ iche ka ndị ahịa wee nwee ike ịkpọ gị site na ekwentị ọ bụla, VibeVox ga-asụgharị olu na akpaghị aka.
incoming.create: Mepụta adreesị SIP maka oku na-abata
incoming.paused: Emepụtara adreesị SIP, a kwụsịtụrụ nnabata
incoming.activeHint: Onye na-asụgharị Bridge na-ege ntị n'ime ụlọ ahụ. A na-asụgharị oku ọ bụla n'oge a na-akpọ ya.
incoming.pausedHint: Mee ka nnata rụọ ọrụ ka VibeVox wee malite ịtụgharị oku na-abata.

outbound.heading: Oku na-apụ apụ
outbound.lead: Kpọọ nọmba ekwentị site na njikọ weebụ ahụ, VibeVox ga-asụgharị mkparịta ụka gị ozugbo.
outbound.noTrunkTitle: Nke mbụ, hazie SIP Trunk na-apụ apụ
outbound.noTrunkHint: Dejupụta fọm "SIP Trunk Ọhụrụ" dị n'elu peeji ahụ - VibeVox ga-eji onye na-enye gị SIP (Zadarma, OnlinePBX, wdg) maka oku na-apụ apụ.
outbound.configureFirst: Nke mbụ, hazie SIP Trunk na-apụ apụ (fọọm dị n'elu)
outbound.invalidNumber: Biko tinye nọmba ziri ezi n'ụdị mba ụwa (+XXXXXXXXXXX)

howTo.heading: Otu esi ahazi
howTo.step1: Nweta asambodo SIP n'aka onye na-enye gị ọrụ (Zadarma, OnlinePBX, Asterisk).
howTo.step2: Tinye ha n'ụdị dị n'elu wee chekwaa ha.
howTo.step3: VibeVox ga-emepụta SIP Trunk na-apụ apụ na LiveKit Cloud na akpaghị aka.
howTo.step4: Na-abịa n'oge na-adịghị anya: URI SIP na-abata maka izipu oku mpụga.

tenantOnly.title: A na-ahazi SIP Trunks n'ọkwa onye nwe ụlọ
tenantOnly.hint1: Enweghị ike ịhazi ekwentị SIP n'okpuru akaụntụ superadmin (na-enweghị UUID onye nwe ụlọ).
tenantOnly.hint2: Banye dịka onye ọrụ nkịtị nke nwere tenantId nke ya iji mepụta SIP Trunk.

sip.connected: A na-echekwa ma mekọrịta SIP Trunk ahụ na LiveKit

sections.providerData: Data maka onye na-enye gị SIP

danger.deleteTrunkHint: A ga-ehichapụ nhazi ahụ. Oku na-apụ apụ ga-akwụsị ruo mgbe ị ga-emegharị SIP Trunk ahụ.
danger.deleteInbound: Wepụ adreesị SIP maka oku na-abata
danger.deleteInboundHint: A ga-ewepụ iwu nchekwa na nnyefe LiveKit. Agaghịzi anabata oku na-abata.
danger.reissueHint: Nyegharịa nbanye na paswọọdụ maka adreesị SIP. Ozi ochie ahụ agaghịzi arụ ọrụ.

outbound2.rateInfo: Onye na-enye gị SIP ga-ekpebi ego ọ ga-eri kwa nkeji nke oku na-apụ apụ.

confirm.deleteTrunkBody: Ihe a agaghị agbanwe agbanwe. Ozugbo ehichapụrụ ya, oku ndị na-apụ apụ ga-akwụsị ruo mgbe e mepụtara SIP Trunk ọhụrụ.
confirm.deleteInboundBody: Ihe a agaghị agbanwe agbanwe. A ga-ehichapụ inbound trunk na dispatch rule na LiveKit Cloud.

page.title: Ntọala Ụlọ Ọrụ
page.subtitle: Njikọta niile, igodo, na paramita AI maka akaụntụ gị
page.upsellTitle: Nkebi a dị na atụmatụ azụmaahịa.
page.upsellBody: N'ebe a, ị nwere ike ịhazi: igodo Gemini API nkeonwe, ntọala ngwa ngwa na ihe ọmụma, njikọta na bot Quest Flow + Telegram, na ijikọ na Chatwoot CRM.

gemini.heading: Igodo API Google Gemini
gemini.lead: Igodo nkeonwe sitere na AI Studio. Nke a na-anọchi igodo zuru ụwa ọnụ maka oku Gemini niile dị na akaụntụ gị.
gemini.leadSuffix: A na-eji ya kama nke zuru ụwa ọnụ maka oku Gemini niile dị na akaụntụ gị.
gemini.successSavedValidated: A chekwaala ma nyochaa igodo ahụ - ọ na-arụ ọrụ.
gemini.successValid: Igodo ahụ dị irè - Gemini API dị.
gemini.confirmDeleteBody: Ọrụ AI ga-eji igodo òkè VibeVox (ọ bụrụ na ahaziri ya).

telegram.heading: Telegram bot maka ọkwa
telegram.lead: Mepụta bot na @BotFather wee tinye akara ngosi ya. Onye ọ bụla zitere bot a ozi na /start ga-enweta ọkwa: ndị ahịa ọhụrụ, akara ngosi, njehie njikọta. Ị nwere ike ịdenye aha ọtụtụ ndị ọrụ ma ọ bụ tinye bot ahụ na otu ma ọ bụ ọwa - a ga-eziga ọkwa ahụ nye onye ọ bụla na akpaghị aka.
telegram.leadAllWhoStart: Onye ọ bụla na-ede ihe na bot a
telegram.leadAfterStart: , ga-enweta ọkwa gbasara ndị ahịa ọhụrụ, akara ngosi, na njehie njikọta. Ị nwere ike ịdenye aha ọtụtụ ndị ọrụ ma ọ bụ tinye bot na otu ma ọ bụ ọwa - onye ọ bụla ga-enweta ọkwa ahụ na akpaghị aka.
telegram.successSavedWithBroadcast: ✓ E chekwara Bot @{{username}}. E zigara ndị debanyere aha {{sent}} ekele.
telegram.successSavedNoBroadcast: ✓ E chekwaala Bot @{{username}}. Onye ọ bụla zitere ya ozi /start ga-enweta ọkwa.
telegram.successTestMany: ✓ E zigara ndị nnata ozi {{count}}. Biko lelee Telegram.
telegram.testTooltip: Zipu ọkwa nnwale site na bot
telegram.confirmUnlinkBody: A ga-ewepụkwa ndị debanyere aha - ọkwa agaghị akwụsị ịbịa.

imageModel.heading: Image generation model
imageModel.lead: Single model for the whole account, used ONLY for image generation/editing in Quest Flow. Translation and recognition keep their own model.
imageModel.needKey: Chekwaa ma nyochaa igodo API mbụ — mmepụta onyonyo chọrọ ya.
imageModel.hint: Nano Banana na-emepụta, na-edezi ma na-ahazi ihe. Imagen na-emepụta naanị site na mmalite.

prompt.heading: Ndụmọdụ
prompt.subtitle: Ntuziaka na ihe ọmụma maka ntụgharị okwu naanị n'ime ụlọ vidiyo
prompt.warning: A gaghị agwakọta ya na Quest Flow
prompt.kbLabel: Ihe ọmụma (ọnọdụ ụlọ ọrụ, Ajụjụ Ndị A Na-ajụkarị, Eziokwu)
prompt.showDefault: Kedu ihe AI na-eji na ndabara?
prompt.appendNote: I nwere ike itinye iwu nke gị - a ga-ejikọta ha na ndị ndabara.
prompt.headerLeadBold1: naanị maka ikpughe ozi n'ime ụlọ vidiyo
prompt.headerLeadPart2: - mgbe ịpịrị ozi na nkata wee họrọ ụda
prompt.contextLeadPart1: A na-eji ya mgbe ịpịrị ozi na nkata ụlọ vidiyo wee họrọ ụda
prompt.contextLeadPart2: A gwakọtara isi ihe ọmụma ahụ na (n'okpuru).
prompt.defaultSummary: Ihe AI na-eji na ndabara (ọ bụrụ na ubi gị tọgbọ chakoo) - pịa iji lee
prompt.extendNoteText: site na iwu/ụdị/okwu nke ha - a ga-ejikọta ha na ntuziaka ndabara dị n'elu na ntọala ihe ọmụma.
prompt.kbHeading: Isi Ihe Ọmụma — TXT / Word / Excel / CSV
prompt.kbLead: Bulite akwụkwọ—katalọgụ, Ajụjụ Ndị A Na-ajụkarị, ndepụta ọnụahịa, iwu, ma ọ bụ ihe ntụnye aka. A na-enyocha ọdịnaya ahụ na sava (Word/Excel/CSV → ederede) ma AI na-ejikọta ya mgbe ị na-edegharị ozi n'ime ụlọ vidiyo. Oke: faịlụ 50 MB / mkpụrụedemede 500,000 na nchekwa data.
prompt.successFileTruncated: E wepụrụ ọdịnaya ahụ ka ọ bụrụ mkpụrụedemede {{max}}.
prompt.successKbCleared: E kpochapụla ntọala ihe ọmụma ahụ.
prompt.confirmKbDeleteBody: Akwụkwọ niile ebugoro ga-apụ n'anya. Agaghị emegharị ihe a.
prompt.presetsLeadPart1: Na mkparịta ụka Ụlọ Ọrụ, ị nwere ike igosi ozi ọ bụla ma gwa AI ka ọ kọwaa ya n'olu ahọpụtara.
prompt.presetsLeadPart2: na-eji ntuziaka gị site na ubi dị n'elu.

questFlow.heading: Quest Flow
questFlow.subtitle: Nzaghachi AI nye ndị ahịa site na bot Telegram na Inbound API
questFlow.warning: Ọ bụrụ na ubi ahụ tọgbọ chakoo, a ga-eji ntuziaka VibeVox izugbe mee ya.
questFlow.kbLabel: Isi ihe ọmụma nke Quest Flow
questFlow.headerLead: Mkparịta ụka AI na onye ahịa ọ bụla n'otu n'otu site na bot Telegram ejikọtara na Quest Flow.
questFlow.keysLead: Igodo ọ bụla bụ ihe nzuzo ị tinyere n'ime ngọngọ Quest Flow HTTP nke agbụ ígwè. VibeVox na-eji ya achọpụta akaụntụ gị. Ị nwere ike ịmepụta ọtụtụ igodo maka agbụ dị iche iche.
questFlow.createdWarning: ⚠ Chekwaa igodo ahụ - a na-egosi ya naanị otu ugboro
questFlow.noKeysHint: Enweghi igodo ọ bụla. Mepụta nke mbụ.
questFlow.confirmRevokeBody: Quest Flow ga-akwụsị ịrụ ọrụ na ya.
questFlow.promptHeading: Ntuziaka maka mkparịta ụka na Telegram
questFlow.promptLead1: Na-ekpebi otu AI si agwa ndị ahịa okwu site na Quest Flow: ụda, ụdị, ihe a ga-amata.
questFlow.promptLeadBold1: Ọ bụrụ na ubi ahụ tọgbọ chakoo
questFlow.promptLead2: - ejiri ntuziaka VibeVox izugbe mee ihe (n'okpuru).
questFlow.promptLeadBold2: Ọ bụrụ na ị dejupụta nke gị
questFlow.promptLead3: - ọ ga-ejikọta ya na ntuziaka bụ isi na ihe ọmụma.
questFlow.defaultSummary: Ihe AI na-eji na ndabara (ọ bụrụ na ubi gị tọgbọ chakoo) - pịa iji lee
questFlow.kbHeading: Isi ihe ọmụma maka Quest Flow
questFlow.kbLead1: Akwụkwọ - katalọgụ ọrụ, ndepụta ọnụahịa, Ajụjụ Ndị A Na-ajụkarị. Bulite TXT / Word / Excel / CSV.
questFlow.kbLeadBold1: Ọ bụrụ na ọ tọgbọ chakoo
questFlow.kbLead2: — AI agaghị enwe eziokwu gbasara ụlọ ọrụ ahụ; ọ ga-aza naanị dabere na ihe ọmụma izugbe.
questFlow.kbLead3: Site na ngalaba "Ntuziaka"—maka ntụgharị vidiyo. Oke: faịlụ 50 MB / mkpụrụedemede 500,000 na nchekwa data.
questFlow.successKbCleared: E kpochapụla ntọala ihe ọmụma ahụ.
questFlow.confirmKbDeleteBody: A ga-ehichapụ ihe ọmụma Quest Flow. Agaghị emegharị ihe a.
questFlow.tagsLead: AI na-ekenye ndị ahịa mkpado ndị a ma ọ bụrụ na ọ chọpụta na mkparịta ụka ahụ dakọtara. A na-egosi mkpado ndị ahụ na kaadị ụlọ onye ahịa ma zigara ha na CRM (Ngalaba nke 4).
questFlow.confirmDeleteBody: A ga-ehichapụ igodo ahụ kpamkpam. Quest Flow agaghịzi arụ ọrụ site na ya — ị ga-achọ ịmepụta igodo ọhụrụ ma dochie ya na usoro ahụ.

chatwoot.heading: Njikọ CRM (Chatwoot)
chatwoot.subtitle: Zipu akụkọ oku na mkpado na Chatwoot na akpaghị aka.
chatwoot.tokenLabel: Akara ngosi API onye nnọchite anya
chatwoot.headerLead: Na-ebufe akụkọ mkparịta ụka na mkpa ndị ahịa na Chatwoot CRM
chatwoot.urlFieldLabel: URL Chatwoot (nke onye na-akwado onwe ya ma ọ bụ app.chatwoot.com)
chatwoot.tokenFieldLabel: Agent Access Token (site na Profaịlụ → Access Token)
chatwoot.testSuccess: Njikọ ahụ na-arụ ọrụ - Chatwoot na-aza.
chatwoot.successSaved: Echekwara. Ugbu a pịa "Nwale Njikọ" iji lelee.
chatwoot.whatSentItem1: Kpọtụrụ onye ahịa (site na telegram_user_id, yana custom_attributes)
chatwoot.whatSentItem2: Mkparịta ụka na ihe ndetu nkeonwe = akụkọ mkparịta ụka zuru oke
chatwoot.whatSentItem3Prefix: Mkpado mkpa niile e kenyere na
chatwoot.whatSentFooter: Ezitere mgbe ị pịa "Zipu na CRM" n'ime mkparịta ụka ụlọ. Nzipu akpaaka mgbe achọpụtara mkpado bụ ihe na-esote.

imagePresets.heading: Image processing blocks
imagePresets.lead: Each block is a preset: a function + prompt + (optional) reference images. The bot button in Quest Flow sends this preset's key, and VibeVox transforms the image with exactly this preset — the AI chooses nothing.
imagePresets.modelHint: change it in the Gemini API section
imagePresets.empty: No blocks yet. Add the first one.
imagePresets.confirmDeleteBody: The block will be removed after you save.
imagePresets.labelPlaceholder: Block name, e.g. “Try on our jacket”
imagePresets.presetKeyLabel: Preset key (paste into the Quest Flow button)
imagePresets.promptExtraLabel: Extra prompt (added to the function's base prompt)
imagePresets.intakeLabel: How the bot asks the client for inputs
imagePresets.intakePlaceholder: e.g. Send a full-height photo of yourself
imagePresets.replyCaptionPlaceholder: Text sent to the client together with the image
imagePresets.referenceHint: Fixed images always added to this block's generation.
imagePresets.referenceMaxHint: Up to {{max}} images for the current model.

mcp.heading: MCP — connect external AI agents / CRM
mcp.lead: Generate an individual key and connect this account to any MCP-compatible agent (Claude, ChatGPT connectors, n8n, your own agent). Two-way: read leads/dialogs and perform actions.
mcp.urlHint: Paste this URL + the key into your agent's MCP settings.
mcp.keysLead: Each key is bound to this account and carries the scopes you select. The raw key is shown once.
mcp.createdWarning: Copy the key now — it is shown only once.
mcp.noKeys: No keys yet. Create the first one.
mcp.confirmDeleteBody: Agents using this key will lose access immediately.
mcp.howToBody: In your agent/CRM add a remote MCP server: the URL above + header Authorization: Bearer <your key>. The agent sees only the tools your scopes allow.

chat.openWithClient: Mepee mkparịta ụka na onye ahịa
chat.deleteMessageConfirmText: Agaghị emegharị ihe a. A ga-ehichapụ ederede na mgbasa ozi agbakwunyere.
chat.deleteMessageConfirmMediaNote: A ga-ehichapụkwa faịlụ anụ ahụ na sava ahụ.
chat.enterpriseOnlyHint: Nkata ụlọ bụ atụmatụ ụlọ ọrụ. Melite atụmatụ gị na ngalaba "Ọnụahịa".
chat.empty: Enweghị ozi ọ bụla na nkata a.

insights.title: Nyocha mkparịta ụka
insights.tooShort: Mkparịta ụka ahụ dị oke mkpụmkpụ maka nyocha.

lobby.title: Isonyere nzukọ vidiyo
lobby.subtitle: Oku vidiyo nwere ntụgharị asụsụ AI n'otu oge
lobby.languageHint: Ị ga-anụ ma hụ ndepụta okwu sitere n'aka onye na-akparịta ụka gị n'asụsụ ahụ.
lobby.shareHint: Detuo ma ziga ya na onye na-akparịta ụka gị ka ọ kpọọ ha òkù ịbịa nzukọ.
lobby.audioConsent: , ma kwenyekwa na nhazi ọdịyo maka ntụgharị asụsụ.
lobby.roomFullMsg: E nweela onye sonyere na nzukọ ahụ. Kpọtụrụ onye kere nzukọ ahụ ma ọ bụ rịọ maka nke ọhụrụ.
lobby.shareSuccessHint: ✓ E depụtala njikọ ahụ. Ziga ya na kọntaktị gị site na Telegram / WhatsApp / Email. Ị nwere ike imechi peeji a ugbu a—njikọ ahụ na-arụ ọrụ mgbe niile.
lobby.overloadedMsg: Too many translations are running right now. Wait a minute and try again — a slot will free up and you'll get in.

paywall.titleNoSub: Iji mepụta ọnụ ụlọ, biko denye aha maka atụmatụ
paywall.titleLowBalance: Enweghị nkeji fọdụrụ na nguzozi gị - debanye aha maka atụmatụ ma ọ bụ zụta ihe ndị ọzọ
paywall.subtitle: Họrọ atụmatụ ma ọ bụ zụta nkeji ndị ọzọ - kwụọ ụgwọ site na Stripe, weghachite ego ozugbo ebe a.
paywall.featureHd: Olu HD, vidiyo, onye nkuzi AI
paywall.topupNote: A ga-agbakwunye nkeji na nguzozi gị ozugbo ị kwụchara ụgwọ.
paywall.topupNoSubInfo: ℹ Ị nweghị ndenye aha na-arụ ọrụ. A ga-agbakwunye Plus €19/ọnwa na nzụta gị—nkeji iri isii dị na atụmatụ gị, yabụ enweghị ụgwọ ọzọ.
paywall.stripeNote: Stripe na-echekwa ụgwọ. A na-akwụ ụgwọ nkeji na akpaghị aka mgbe a kwụchara ụgwọ.

billingPage.title: Tarifụ na ịkwụ ụgwọ
billingPage.subtitle: Atụmatụ niile nke VibeVox - họrọ atụmatụ dabara na ọsọ ọrụ gị.
billingPage.untilEndOfPeriod: ruo na njedebe nke oge akwụ ụgwọ
billingPage.cancelAutoRenewQuestion: Kagbuo mmeghari ohuru nke ndenye aha gị na akpaghị aka?
billingPage.cancelTooltip: Kagbuo mmeghari ohuru akpaaka. Ndebanye aha gị ga-anọgide na-arụ ọrụ ruo mgbe oge a ga-agwụ.
billingPage.resumeAutoRenewQuestion: Ị ga-amaliteghachi mmeghari ohuru ndenye aha na akpaghị aka?
billingPage.resumeNextChargeNote: Ụgwọ ọzọ ga-eme na njedebe nke oge a.
billingPage.resumeTooltip: Malitegharịa mmeghari ohuru akpaka nke ndenye aha.
billingPage.promoHint: A ga-etinye mbelata ahụ na akpaghị aka mgbe ị debanyere aha maka atụmatụ ma ọ bụ zụta nkeji ndị ọzọ.
billingPage.topupCarriedTooltip: A na-ebuga nkeji site na oge gara aga. A na-ebu ụzọ jiri ha.
billingPage.topupHelp: Ihe mmịfe ịzụrụ ọzọ. Dị na ndenye aha na-arụ ọrụ.
billingPage.tierPlusSummary: Maka mkparịta ụka nkeonwe na ndị ọrụ onwe ha
billingPage.tierStandardSummary: Maka ndị otu na ndị mkparịta ụka na-arụ ọrụ
billingPage.tierEnterpriseSummary: Nchịkọta AI zuru ezu maka azụmaahịa
billingPage.featureHd: Olu ntụgharị okwu HD (Aoede, Charon, Kore)
billingPage.featureLearnHub: AI Learning Hub — dialects nke ya
billingPage.featureCRM: Kaadị ndị ahịa nwere njirimara akpaaka
billingPage.whatsAppMessage: Ndewo! Enwere m mmasị na atụmatụ Enterprise VibeVox.
billingPage.searchLanguagesPlaceholder: Chọta asụsụ gị - dịka ọmụmaatụ, "Portuguese", "português", ru
billingPage.faqQ1: Gịnị na-eme nkeji ndị a na-ejighị eme ihe?
billingPage.faqA1: Nkeji ndị a na-ejighị eme ihe na-aga n'ọnwa kalenda na-abịa. Ha na-agwụ n'ọnwa nke atọ.
billingPage.faqQ2: Enwere m ike ịkagbu ndenye aha m n'oge ọ bụla?
billingPage.faqA2: Ee. Ị nwere ike ịkagbu na akaụntụ nkeonwe gị site na otu pịa. Oge akwụgoro ụgwọ ga-aga n'ihu ruo mgbe ọ ga-agwụ.
billingPage.faqA3: Nchịkọta AI zuru oke: kaadị ndị ahịa nwere njirimara akpaaka, ikike Telegram, ntuziaka ahaziri ahazi, Kalenda Google, mkpa smart tagging, mbupụ CRM, njikọta na questflow.pro, na taabụ nchịkwa dị iche.
billingPage.faqQ4: Kedu onye na-enye ọrụ SIP telephony ị chọrọ?
billingPage.faqA4: Ọ bụla nke dabara na RFC: Zadarma, OnlinePBX, Asterisk/FreePBX, wdg. VibeVox na-emepụta outbound trunk na akpaghị aka.
billingPage.topupDescription: €0.17 kwa nkeji. Site na nkeji iri isii ruo awa iri. A na-enye ya otuto ozugbo mgbe a kwụrụ ụgwọ.
billingPage.discountWithPromo: na mbelata nke -{{percent}}% yana koodu nkwalite {{code}}
billingPage.cancelDetailActiveUntil: Ndebanye aha ahụ ga-anọgide na-arụ ọrụ ruo {{date}}.
billingPage.cancelDetailMinutesAvailable: Nkeji tarifụ dị ruo ụbọchị a; enwere ike ịzụta nkeji ndị ọzọ.
billingPage.cancelDetailAutoClose: Mgbe nke ahụ gasịrị, ndenye aha ga-emechi na akpaghị aka.
billingPage.autoRenewCancelledHeading: Emechiri mmeghari ohuru akpaghị aka · ndenye aha ga-emechi {{date}}
billingPage.autoRenewCancelledHint: Oge nke atụmatụ gị dị irè ruo ụbọchị a; ị nwere ike ịzụta ndị ọzọ. Pịa "Maliteghachi" ma ọ bụrụ na ị gbanwee obi gị.
billingPage.languagesLead: Ndepụta asụsụ zuru oke nke a na-akwado site na ntụgharị asụsụ n'otu oge. Nchọpụta asụsụ isi mmalite akpaka - onye ọ bụla sonyere na-ahọrọ asụsụ obodo ha.
billingPage.languagesNoResults: A hụghị asụsụ ahụ na ndepụta nke ndị a kwadoro.
billingPage.languagesNoResultsHint: Nwaa mkpụrụokwu dị iche—dịka ọmụmaatụ, n'asụsụ Bekee ma ọ bụ n'asụsụ obodo. Ọ bụrụ na asụsụ ahụ efuola, gwa anyị, anyị ga-agbakwụnye ya.

seo.title: VibeVox - Ntụgharị AI oge niile maka oku vidiyo na SIP
seo.description: VibeVox bụ ikpo okwu ntụgharị olu nke AI na-akwado n'otu oge, nke na-akwado asụsụ karịrị 100. Oku vidiyo, ekwentị SIP, nkata ndị ahịa, na nyocha mkparịta ụka nke AI na-akwado.
seo.keywords: Nsụgharị AI, ntụgharị asụsụ n'otu oge, oku vidiyo na ntụgharị asụsụ, ekwentị SIP, onye ntụgharị olu

pwaInstall.name: VibeVox
pwaInstall.description: VibeVox bụ onye ntụgharị asụsụ AI n'otu oge maka oku olu na vidiyo n'asụsụ 108. WebRTC na SIP telephony, onye enyemaka olu, na ntụgharị asụsụ n'oge na-arụ ọrụ na ngwaọrụ ọ bụla.
pwaInstall.installCta: Tinye VibeVox na ihuenyo mbụ gị—oku nwere ntụgharị asụsụ, SIP, na onye enyemaka AI n'otu pịa. Ọ na-arụ ọrụ dị ka ngwa nkịtị.
pwaInstall.buttonSubtitle: Gaa na ihuenyo mbụ - malite na otu pịa
